closureCriteria.criterion: $BTD cell/range ontology is complete in SPEC
evidence: BITCODE_SPEC_V27.md defines supply state, cell/range model, mint lifecycle, measureminting quantity law, access rights, and non-fungible semantics

closureCriteria.criterion: tests prove cap existence and overflow rejection
fungible mutation remains rejected in API and package surfaces
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/user.ts returns 410 for admin generic BTD mutation attempts
packages/api/src/routes/auxillaries.ts returns 410 for auxillary generic BTD mutation attempts
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/user-btd-mutation.test.ts covers unauthenticated, non-admin, and admin package-route mutation rejection
uapi/tests/api/userBtdRoute.test.ts covers active auxillary mutation route rejection

closureCriteria.criterion: UI copy keeps BTC fee and $BTD share/read-right separate
evidence: uapi/components/base/bitcode/btd/btd-tracker.tsx separates BTC fee liquidity from non-fungible BTD share/read-right holdings
uapi/components/base/bitcode/btd/BTDPrices.tsx labels BTC fee basis and Terminal/Exchange acquisition paths
uapi/app/auxillaries/components/AuxillariesBTDPane.tsx describes BTC fee liquidity separately from BTD holdings
uapi/app/(root)/components/MarketingBtdShareMetricsSection.tsx separates BTC fees and BTD read-right posture
uapi/app/(root)/components/MarketingFaqSection.tsx states BTC is the fee asset and BTD is not a fungible checkout token

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.

nonPromotionAssertions: Gate 2 closure does not claim registry persistence, range proof, access policy UI, generated V27 proof-family closure, or promotion
No value-bearing mainnet readiness or launch is claimed by Gate 2 closure
remainingGateFamilies: Gate 16: Product Surfaces, Research Rebinding, And Promotion Proof
